name: Sweet Potato Dessert Squares
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cold mashed sweet potatoes (no butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 1 cup of the cake mix.
2. Combine the remaining cake mix with melted butter and beaten egg; spread into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
3. Whisk together filling ingredients until smooth; pour over the crust.
4. For topping, cut reserved butter into crumbly pieces mixed with the cake mix.
5. Stir in pecans, sugar, and cinnamon; sprinkle over the filling.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 60-65 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool. Garnish with whipped cream and pecan halves if desired.
